query: SELECT atoll, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN published = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as published, SUM(CASE WHEN published = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unpublished FROM island_guides GROUP BY atoll ORDER BY atoll;
